title: The Names of the Messenger of God 's Milch Camels 1151 The Names of the Messenger of God's Milch Sheep (Mand'ilj
description: The Names of the Messenger of God 's Milch Camels 1151 The Names of the Messenger of God's Milch Sheep (Mand'ilj. Recorded under the year 10 AH (631–632 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 09.
